title: System Functions
description: The system shall provide a comprehensive learning support system that conducts precise assessments, identifies challenges related to reading and working memory, and delivers personalized AI-driven tutoring experiences.

title: Detailed Functional Specification
description: The system shall provide a tailored language tutoring environment using personalized games, activities, and a user interface tailored to the unique needs of individuals with Dyslexia.

title: User Interface
description: The system shall provide a user interface that is tailored to the unique needs of individuals with Dyslexia, including interactive games, chat, and voice interactions.

title: Personalized Learning Experiences
description: The system shall provide personalized learning experiences for individuals with Dyslexia, including interactive games, activities, and a tailored interface.

title: AI-Driven Tutoring
description: The system shall provide AI-driven tutoring experiences that are tailored to the unique needs of individuals with Dyslexia.

title: Precise Assessments
description: The system shall conduct precise assessments to identify challenges related to reading and working memory.

title: Early and Accurate Diagnostic Tools
description: The system shall provide early and accurate diagnostic tools to identify individuals with Dyslexia.

title: Personalized Interventions
description: The system shall deliver personalized interventions to individuals with Dyslexia.
